code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Upstream
    participant agent-client-relationships
    participant Database
    participant agent-assurance
    participant des

    Upstream->>+agent-client-relationships: POST /api/:arn/invitation
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for pending invitations.
    agent-client-relationships->>+agent-assurance: GET /agent-assurance/agent-details/:arn
    agent-assurance-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    agent-client-relationships->>+des: GET /registration/business-details/... or /vat/customer/vrn/...
    des-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for active relationship.
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Read: Check for partial-auth relationship (Groupware_WikiPage).
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Create: Create new invitation.
    agent-client-relationships-->>-Upstream: Final Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个序列图，展示Upstream服务调用agent-client-relationships创建邀请的完整流程。关键是这个流程要先后经过agent-assurance和des两个下游服务校验，最后落库。
明白。我注意到Upstream到agent-client-relationships是POST /api/:arn/invitation，这是一个异步调用吗？还有，agent-client-relationships到agent-assurance和des都是GET请求，这两个调用是串行还是并行？
POST是同步调用，需要等待最终响应。两个GET是串行的：必须先调agent-assurance获取agent-details，再调des获取business-details或vat信息。两个服务都返回Response后，才能继续后续的数据库操作。

好的，我已经把参与者按顺序排好：Upstream、agent-client-relationships、Database、agent-assurance、des。第一步画了Upstream到agent-client-relationships的POST调用，带激活条。接下来是agent-client-relationships到Database的Read，检查pending invitations。
对，然后agent-client-relationships要激活agent-assurance去GET /agent-assurance/agent-details/:arn。这里要注意，agent-assurance返回Response后，agent-client-relationships的激活条要保持，因为它还要继续调des。
已添加。现在agent-client-relationships带着激活条调用des，GET /registration/business-details/... 或 /vat/customer/vrn/...，des返回Response。接下来是数据库操作部分，我需要确认一下顺序。
数据库这边有三步Read和一步Create：先Read检查active relationship，再Read检查partial-auth relationship（这个在Groupware_WikiPage里），最后Create new invitation。都完成后，agent-client-relationships给Upstream返回Final Response，同时关闭激活条。
全部完成了。我加了autonumber编号，参与者顺序是Upstream、agent-client-relationships、Database、agent-assurance、des。流程从POST开始，经过两次外部服务GET校验，三次数据库Read和一次Create，最后返回Final Response。结构清晰，符合业务逻辑。
